header.title: Murbach abbey entrance gate viewed from the garden.jpg
header.description: A view from the monastery garden onto the entrance gate into the former abbey, and the N steeple of the St. Leogedar abbey church
header.author: DaLoetz

header.title: Murbach abbey entrance gate between monastery buildings and monastic garden.jpg
header.description: A view from the monastic garden onto the entrance gate into the former abbey, flanked by two former buildings of the abbey, above it the S steeple of the St. Leogedar abbey church
header.author: DaLoetz

header.title: Murbach, Mairie 02.jpg
header.description: La mairie de Murbach, côté ouest
header.author: Rauenstein
